query: INSERT INTO crm_messages (leadId, phone, direction, messageType, content, senderName, timestamp) SELECT id, phone, 'inbound', 'text', REPLACE(notes, 'Primeira mensagem: ', ''), name, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(createdAt) * 1000 FROM crm_leads WHERE notes IS NOT NULL AND notes LIKE 'Primeira mensagem:%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 72z9zwCQQTtJjjC.7f634d589b23 --database NKs9YYU4Bt79zUwnWH56wx --execute INSERT INTO crm_messages (leadId, phone, direction, messageType, content, senderName, timestamp) SELECT id, phone, 'inbound', 'text', REPLACE(notes, 'Primeira mensagem: ', ''), name, UNIX_TIMESTAMP(createdAt) * 1000 FROM crm_leads WHERE notes IS NOT NULL AND notes LIKE 'Primeira mensagem:%';
